Trophy properties moving in days, not weeks. Pre-market activity is intense.

Seasonal buyers arriving early this year. Beach access lots are the prize.

stephenNote: The premium coastal neighborhoods are firmly in seller territory. Interior locations — particularly Mid-Island — offer the best negotiating leverage for buyers this spring.
